full_name: Hot rolled non-alloy structural steel S235JR (material number 1.0038)
scope: Non-alloy structural steel (mild steel) for general structural use in bolted and welded construction. 'S'=structural, '235'=min yield strength (MPa) for thickness <=16 mm, 'JR'=Charpy V-notch impact energy 27 J at +20 degC.

chemical_composition.note: Values for long/flat products; N limit may be waived where minimum Al or N-binding elements present.

license_note: composition/property data widely republished by independent free sources, not the copyrighted EN document text
